name: cursor
description: Dispatch tasks to cursor-agent from Codex with worktree isolation, background jobs, and session boundary safety.

interface.shortDescription: Dispatch Codex tasks to cursor-agent in isolated worktrees
interface.longDescription: Use Cursor Agent to delegate tasks from Codex to cursor-agent with git worktree isolation, foreground or background execution, job status/result/cancel controls, and per-session job boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Dispatch this task to cursor-agent in the background
